**Now that you have hopefully mastered your story slides and reel framework for three weeks, be sure to study your analytics.**

Head to your ARCHIVE and filter STORIES.

Check which stories got the most views.

Now head to your PROFESSIONAL DASHBOARD and review which content received the most engagement.

Select your highest performing stories, or your best piece of content, and create story slides around that.

If you had a day where you got sales, then recreate those story slides and monitor their results.

Remember to always follow the story stack framework and make sure your stories match your posted reel/reels for the day.
